/usr/bin/c++ -g -arch x86_64 -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/Zaitan.dir/app/main.mm.o CMakeFiles/Zaitan.dir/app/AppDelegate.mm.o CMakeFiles/Zaitan.dir/platform/WindowController.mm.o CMakeFiles/Zaitan.dir/platform/DebugOverlay.mm.o CMakeFiles/Zaitan.dir/input/Hotkeys.mm.o CMakeFiles/Zaitan.dir/src/Desktop.cpp.o -o Zaitan.app/Contents/MacOS/Zaitan  -framework AppKit -framework ApplicationServices -framework Carbon
